def negative_magic_thresholds_duplicated_across_modules():
    rule_id = "magic_thresholds_duplicated_across_modules"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated numeric thresholds with shared meaning that are copied across modules."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
